build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run build || (echo 'Frontend build failed; see above for errors' && exit 1)

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* wss://api.opensymphony.dev wss://api.opensymphony.app; font-src 'self' data:
